calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Thomas Lucas As Trustee Of Trust For Breach Of Trust, Unfitness To Serve; And For Immediate Suspension Of Powers
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for and with Thomas Lucas (Current Trustee). Jeff Rosenberg in Propria Persona. Tiffany Garner, interested party.

Mr. Rosenberg expressed disapproval of Mr. Lucas being the Trustee and stated that he was not satisfied with the services Mr. Lucas was providing. Mr. Robello stated that Mr. Urbatsch did not appear as he did not get a response from Mr. Rosenberg. In addition, Ms. Robello stated that there were minimal assets in the trust, that Mr. Lucas made attempts to address Mr. Rosenberg's concerns and that it was not a benefit to bring the trust under Court supervision. The court directed all Parties to talk in the hallway and to make the lines of communication open. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith./J. Shannon.

Petn. For Order Auth. Establishment Of A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Urbatsch appearing for petitioner, attorney in fact Tom Lucas. Jeffrey Rosenberg is in court. Court supervision issue addressed. Mr. Rosenberg waived bond. He does not feel he need any court supervision at this time. Court advised him that he has the right to asked the Court to review the trustee's accounting. Mr. Rosenberg wants to waive accounting and bond. Petition is granted. Order signed as modified. Court questioned if Mr. Lucas will get his own attorney. Mr. Urbatsch does not think that is necessary at this time.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

Petn. For Order Auth. Establishment Of A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Continued To May-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
